    • Example 2: Two arm | Interim | Continuous | t-test
    • Example 3: Two arm | Fixed design | Two correlated continuous endpoints | t-test

    • Example 5: Multi-arm | Fixed design | Single continuous endpoint | Dunnett test + MCP-Mod
    • Example 6: Two-arm | Fixed design | Single continuous endpoint | Overall + exploratory subgroup analysis
    • Example 7: Two-arm | Fixed design | Single continuous endpoint | Bayesian Go/No-Go with placebo borrowing
    • Example 8: Seamless Ph2a/2b | Two-arm -> Multi-arm | Single continuous endpoint | Bayesian Go/No-Go + Bayesian MCP-Mod

Package index

All functions

Population
Population: Manage a patient population
Timer
Timer: Track timed events and apply condition-triggered analyses
Trial
Trial: Simulate a multi‑arm clinical trial
add_timepoints()
Add Timepoints to a Timer
clone_trial()
Clone a Trial Object Multiple Times
gen_plan()
Generate Trial Enrollment and Dropout Plan
gen_population()
Generate a Population Object
gen_timepoints()
Generate Piecewise-Linear Enrollment and Dropout Plan
get_col_names()
Extract Column Names from Populations
prettify_results()
Format Trial Results as a Data Frame
replicate_trial()
Create Multiple Trials with Generated Populations
run_trials()
Run Multiple Trial Objects
trigger_by_calendar()
Trigger Analysis at a Calendar Time
trigger_by_fraction()
Trigger Analysis at a Sample Fraction
vector_to_dataframe()
Convert Vector to Population Data Frame
